Bespoke van conversions / Metro Detroit

DRIFTER

Twenty-four builds a year. Each one numbered. Each builder named. Built for the person who has already crossed the threshold.

Start Your Build Andara Collection

Commission status

2026 intake: selective review.

No tiers. No entry product. The schedule opens around capacity, not demand.

24 builds per year
01 standard
26 coordinate stars
MI built in Michigan

The collection

One standard. No decorative ambition.

DRIFTER builds coaches for transitions already earned. The van is not the fantasy. It is what happens after the fantasy is gone.

Process

A build with authorship.

01 / Brief

Tell us what begins next.

The first conversation is not a product configurator. It is a commission brief: where the van needs to go, how it needs to hold up, and what cannot be compromised.

02 / Author

A named builder owns the decisions.

Each conversion is numbered and accountable. Materials, layout, systems, storage, and service access are resolved as one build, not a stack of options.

03 / Release

The handoff is the threshold.

When the van leaves Metro Detroit, it carries the mark, the coordinates, and the record of what was built for the person stepping into it.

The drift

The refusal is part of the product.

Most brands chase the wrong audience until the work becomes costume. DRIFTER holds a narrower line: deliberate movement, technical precision, institutional restraint, and no explanation of price as performance.

ShroudComposed signal
HelmPrecise decisions
AnchorWhat comes next

Commission inquiry

Start with the brief.

Tell us what the van has to make possible. If the schedule is closed, the answer is a sentence. If there is room, the next step is a call.
